name: crm-portal-ts
description: TypeScript version of the ISP CRM Portal

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.smoke: node --test dist/tests/smoke.test.js dist/tests/migrations.test.js dist/tests/teryt_import_relations.test.js dist/tests/network_vendor_parsers.test.js dist/tests/network_auto_import.test.js dist/tests/network_auto_import_teryt.test.js tests/runtime-config.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run smoke
scripts.verify:release: npm run test && npm run deployment:test && npm run frontend:test && npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run frontend:lint && npm run frontend:build
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify:release && npm run container:smoke
